name: Chocolate Banana Split
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Cup thawed COOL WHIP LITE Whipped Topping
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour milk into a medium bowl.
2. Add pudding mix.
3. Beat with a wire whisk for 2 minutes.
4. Spoon half of the pudding evenly into 4 dessert dishes.
5. Layer with banana slices.
6. Spoon remaining pudding over bananas.
7. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
8. Top each serving with 2 tablespoons whipped topping.
9. Sprinkle with walnuts.
10. Store leftover dessert in the refrigerator.
